title: Implement intake endpoint POST /intake/handle-this with stable response schema
context: Implement server-side intake endpoint per docs/design/handle-this-intake-pipeline.md. Start with deterministic planner and strict request validation. Keep API prefix configurable so deployments can expose /v1/intake/handle-this without hardcoding.
acceptance: Authenticated POST returns {task, subtasks, owner_agent, confidence, clarifying_questions}. Includes validation for empty message_text and bad source_url plus 200/401/422 tests. Router is registered in app/main.py.

title: Add Mission Control Handle This models, API method, and compact Chat review flow
context: In lobs-mission-control, add intake models to Models.swift, API client method to APIService.swift, and message-level Handle This action/review sheet under Sources/LobsMissionControl/Chat/.
acceptance: From non-system chat message, user can launch Handle This, edit optional URL/context, call endpoint, see structured plan, and create task via existing task APIs. Includes loading/error UX and basic decode/API coverage.
